Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MARTA MARGETA, MD, DAVID ABRAM SOLOMON, MD, NERISSA U KO, MD, AND THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' demurrer to the complaint is overruled as to the fourth cause of action, which adequately pleads negligent infliction of emotional distress. The demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend.

The complaint is ambiguous as to the number of plaintiffs and who they are. (Dmr. Memo. 5:14-6:28.)

The complaint's second, third and fifth claims are not "causes of action," but rather forms of damages. (Dmr. Memo. 7:1-9:3.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
